backlog.title: aios-evidence crate skeleton (S3.1 evidence log client)
acceptance_criteria: crates/aios-evidence/ created and added to workspace members
EvidenceReceipt type carrying the §3.1 / §9.5 fields (evr_ id, trace context, BLAKE3 content hash, append-only chain pointer)
Append-only log invariant (INV-005) encoded at the type level (no API path that rewrites a receipt)
Wire format that the Capability Runtime will emit at every lifecycle edge
Unit tests with cargo build/test/clippy all PASS

completed.title: aios-action integration tests + golden fixtures + RFC 8785 full adoption (M1 closure)
completed.evidence: cargo build/test/clippy --workspace --all-targets -D warnings all PASS + cargo fmt --check PASS; 102 tests green (76 unit + 26 integration); serde_jcs 0.1 added to workspace deps (Governor approved); canonical.rs delegates to serde_jcs::to_string (RFC 8785 ECMA-262 number normalization closed — golden test pins that 1.5e2 and 150.0 produce identical request_hash); CanonicalError simplified to single Projection variant (sort_value helper retired); tests/common/mod.rs shared helpers + 3 integration test files (golden_envelope: 8, lifecycle_replay: 6, error_paths: 12); 3 hand-written golden JSON fixtures (envelope_success_full / envelope_policy_denied / envelope_rolled_back) each parse + validate phase ↔ conditions + JCS canonical round-trip stable; M1 closed
